name: Interlife General Insurance Company S.A.
summary: Interlife General Insurance Company S.A. operates as a general insurance company for individual and business in Greece. It offers car, boat, property, personal, travel, legal, liability, bicycle and skate, technical, and transport insurance products, as well as financial products. Interlife General Insurance Company S.A. was founded in 1991 and is headquartered in Thessaloniki, Greece.
